name: chess-test
start: source $HOME/.bashrc 2>/dev/null || true; export FLUTTER_HOME=$HOME/flutter; export ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=$HOME/android-sdk; export ANDROID_HOME=$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT; export ANDROID_NDK_ROOT=$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/ndk/26.1.10909125; export PATH=$HOME/.cargo/bin:$FLUTTER_HOME/bin:$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platform-tools:$PATH
